message:
feat(tui): add adaptive width-class layout policy for SystemHealth dashboard (br-1xt0m.1.11.2)

Dashboard mode now adapts to three width classes:
- Wide (>=80 cols): tiles + gauge + anomaly cards (full layout)
- Medium (40-79): tiles + anomaly cards (gauge skipped)
- Narrow (<40): compact summary line + anomaly cards only

WidthClass enum provides deterministic breakpoints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
